category_sources: source_facts.description says CPU feature identification for Go; official README says Package cpuid provides information about the CPU running the current program.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cpuid; official repository name is klauspost/cpuid.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents install and usage; README links package home to the official repository and package documentation is on pkg.go.dev for the Go module.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already supplied as https://github.com/klauspost/cpuid; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.executables, and official README describe Go CPU identification plus an installable cpuid binary.
